screens.settings.account.removeQuickAcce: This will remove @{handle} from the quick access list.
screens.settings.activitySubscription.pr: This feature allows users to receive notifications for your new posts and replies. Who do you want to enable this for?
screens.settings.appearance.recommendThe: We recommend the theme font for the best experience.
screens.settings.automation.showLabelHin: Show others that this account is automated.
screens.settings.export.betaNotice: This feature is in beta. You can read more about repository exports in {#t0}this blogpost{/t0}.
screens.settings.export.chatDataHint: You can also download your chat data as a \"JSONL\" file. This file only includes chat messages that you have sent and does not include chat messages that you have received.
screens.settings.export.repositoryHint: Your account repository, containing all public data records, can be downloaded as a \"CAR\" file. This file does not include media embeds, such as images, or your private data, which must be fetched separately.
screens.settings.hint.allLanguagesShown: All languages will be shown in your feeds
screens.settings.hint.filterWhoCanReceiv: Filter who can opt to receive notifications for your activity
screens.settings.hint.filterWhoYouReceiv: Filter who you receive notifications from
screens.settings.hint.noLanguagesSelecte: If none are selected, all languages will be shown in your feeds.
screens.settings.hint.preferredTranslati: Preferred language for translations in your feed
screens.settings.interests.helpHint: Your selected interests help us serve you content you care about.
screens.settings.interests.recommendTwo: We recommend selecting at least two interests.
screens.settings.interests.selectPrompt: Select your interests from the options below
screens.settings.label.allowNotifyingOth: Allow notifying others of my posts
screens.settings.notifications.activityD: Get notifications for starter pack joins, verification, and other activity.
screens.settings.notifications.followsDe: Get notifications when people follow you.
screens.settings.notifications.likesDesc: Get notifications when people like your posts.
screens.settings.notifications.likesRepo: Get notifications when people like your reposts.
screens.settings.notifications.mentionsD: Get notifications when people mention you.
screens.settings.notifications.quotesDes: Get notifications when people quote your posts.
screens.settings.notifications.repliesDe: Get notifications when people reply to your posts.
screens.settings.notifications.repostsDe: Get notifications when people repost your posts.
screens.settings.notifications.repostsRe: Get notifications when people repost your reposts.
screens.settings.notifications.subscribe: Get notifications when there's activity on posts you're subscribed to.
screens.settings.notifications.title.eve: Settings for notifications for everything else
screens.settings.notifications.title.lik: Settings for notifications for likes of your reposts
screens.settings.notifications.title.rep: Settings for notifications for reposts of your reposts
screens.settings.privacy.discoverability: Notifies every app, including the Bluesky app, that you don't want your account shown to people who aren't signed in.
Honoring this request is voluntary: your profile and posts stay publicly available, and some apps may show your account anyway. {#t0}Learn more.{/t0}
screens.settings.privacy.learnMorePublic: Learn more about what is public on Bluesky.
screens.settings.thread.followingOnlyHin: These settings only apply to the Following feed.
screens.settings.thread.showThreadedView: Show post replies in a threaded tree view
